testReportSummary: Build is clean with 0 warnings (GenerateDocumentationFile enabled, CS1591 active). All 64 existing unit tests pass. 60 new integration tests verify XML documentation presence and content for all public types/properties/methods in Metrics/ and Improvement/, confirm <param>/<returns>/<remarks> tags on complex methods, and validate MetricsTracker+ImprovementAnalyzer end-to-end workflow including persistence round-trips. Runtime verification confirms the application starts and handles missing arguments correctly.
